title: Manchester City Board Game By Football Billionaire Board Games Age 6+ | Family Board Games for Kids and Adults | Ages 6+ | Trading & Family Strategy Board Game Game for 2-4 Players (MANCHESTER CITY)
features: BUILD YOUR MAN CITY EMPIRE: Build your perfect team by combining the latest stars like Erling Haaland and Kevin De Bruyne with Legends including David Silva, Sergio Aguero and more.
CAN YOU BEAT YOUR RIVALS? In this official Manchester City Football Club Board Game, you take on your friends and family to build the best all-star Man City team and compete for the Champions Cup!
QUICK SET UP, EASY TO PLAY: This game is quick to set up, easy to pack away and comes with uncomplicated, easy to follow instructions. Once you open the box you’ll be playing and hooked in seconds!

NO REPETITIVE GAMEPLAY: Just like life at Manchester City Football Club, every game is different! Each time you play, there will be a new challenge to contend with. You’ll be demanding a rematch with friends and family again and again!
COMPATIBLE WITH POPULAR TRADING CARDS: Want to expand your squad? Assemble your footballing dynasty by adding popular trading cards to your original game. As seen on Dragons Den.
description: Product Description HAVE YOU GOT WHAT IT TAKES TO BE THE BEST? COMPETE FOR TROPHIES Think you've got what it takes to be the boss and guide your Man CIty team to glory? Step into the hot seat as you try to build your team from scratch, collecting and trading your favourite City players. In the Official Manchester City Football Club Board Game, you can combine current stars like Erling Haaland and Kevin De Bruyne with Legends of the past like Colin Bell, Vincent Kompany, Yaya Toure and more. Take on your friends and family and become champions . SIGN AND SELL PLAYERS Experience the highs and lows of being the boss as you buy players , play fast and loose in the transfer market and build an all star team . HIRE AND FIRE MANAGERS Face off against your rivals in a race to build an all star team with the highest star rating. See if you can beat your competition on the way to becoming the wealthiest and most successful football club owner in Man City history. Official Man City Board Game Defeat your opponents on & off the pitch Easy to learn and competitive gameplay Compete with your rivals to build your all star perfect squad Expand your squad with popular trading cards Just like life at the Etihad, every game is different! Build your Man City empire No football knowledge needed! Quick set up, easy to play
